visual_description: A man in a white shirt and black tie stands at the head of a large, dark conference table, gesturing with his right hand. Four other men, three in white shirts and one in a white shirt with a dark uniform jacket, are seated around the table, looking up at him. The room is a modern office with glass partitions and a television screen visible in the background.
audio_description: A man is speaking in a loud, agitated, and confrontational tone, as if in the middle of an argument.
